<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the Monolog package. * * (c) Jordi Boggiano <j.boggiano@seld.be> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Monolog\Handler; /** * Exception can be thrown if an extension for a handler is missing * * @author Christian Bergau <cbergau86@gmail.com> */ class MissingExtensionException extends \Exception { }
